Hardware Component File

HFCK (Kit Main Libre Evolué)

System Identification and Configuration Data

Metadata

File reference HFCK_Kit_Main_Libre_Evolue_-Release_9.json
Source type JSON Data Array
Status
Validated

Technical Warning

Ensure specific OBD protocol matching before hardware implementation to avoid controller lockout.

Safety Guidelines →

OBD Configuration Details

Protocol CAN
Baudrate 10400
Send ID 750
Receive ID 770
Functional Addr 0F
Functional Name HFCK
